amendments.text: The following loading information must be furnished: (a) The weight and location of each item of equipment installed when the airplane was weighed under Sec. 23.25. (b) Appropriate loading instructions for each possible loading condition between the maximum and minimum weights determined under Sec. 23.25 that can result in a center of gravity beyond-- (1) The extremes selected by the applicant; (2) The extremes within which the structure is proven; or (3) The extremes within which compliance with each functional requirement is shown.
